TEXT.id: PaiwanCh2_011_THE HUSBAND KILLED BY HIS WIFE
TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}
TEXT.source: vaɫaw a uqaɫay a qintsi nua vavayan (Qatsiɫay village, p.173)

S.FORM: uzai a marevaɫaw ka sitsuayan a napenaulaulain.
S.PHON: uzai a marəvaʎaw ka siʦuajan a napənauɭauɭain.
S.FORM: uzai a marevaljaw ka sicuayan a napenaulaulain.
S.PHON: uzai a maRəvaʎaw ka siʦuajan a napənauɣauɣain.
S.TRANSL: Once upon a time there was a married couple in great distress.

S.FORM: qau nekanga nu muri kanen.
S.PHON: qau nəkaŋa nu muri kanən.
S.FORM: qau nekanga nu muri kanen.
S.PHON: qau nəkaŋa nu muRi kanən.
S.TRANSL: They had nothing to eat.

S.FORM: qau "kemudanga itjen?" aya tiamadju.
S.PHON: qau "kəmudaŋa icən" aja tiamaɉu.
S.FORM: qau "kemudanga itjen?" aya tiamadju.
S.PHON: qau "kəmudaŋa iʦən" aja tiamaɉu.
S.TRANSL: “What are we to do?” they said.

S.FORM: "maya sika neka nu tja kitanen.
S.PHON: "maja sika nəka nu ca kitanən.
S.FORM: "maya sika neka nu tja kitanen.
S.PHON: "maja sika nəka nu ʦa kitanən.
S.TRANSL: “This way we’ve got no way of earning.

S.FORM: nangaq a vaik aken a sema tjua maɫaqaɫan," aya azua vaɫaw a uqaɫay.
S.PHON: naŋaq a vaik akən a səma cua maʎaqaʎan," aja azua vaʎaw a uqaʎaj.
S.FORM: nangaq a vaik aken a sema tjua maljaqaljan," aya azua valjaw a uqaljay.
S.PHON: naŋaq a vaik akən a səma ʦua maʎaqaʎan," aja azua vaʎaw a uqaʎaj.
S.TRANSL: I had better go to another place,” said the husband.

S.FORM: qau vaik, sa tsuatsuay ini pangtjez anga i tjumaq.
S.PHON: qau vaik, sa ʦuaʦuaj ini paŋcəz aŋa i cumaq.
S.FORM: qau vaik, sa cuacuay ini pangtjez anga i tjumaq.
S.PHON: qau vaik, sa ʦuaʦuaj ini paŋʦəz aŋa i ʦumaq.
S.TRANSL: So he went away, and for a long time he didn’t come home.

S.FORM: manu uzai a uqaɫay a lemulutjuk tazua vaɫaw a vavayan.
S.PHON: manu uzai a uqaʎaj a ɭəmuɭucuk tazua vaʎaw a vavajan.
S.FORM: manu uzai a uqaljay a lemulutjuk tazua valjaw a vavayan.
S.PHON: manu uzai a uqaʎaj a ɣəmuɣuʦuk tazua vaʎaw a vavajan.
S.TRANSL: A man tempted the wife.

S.FORM: "kudain a ini pangtjez anga a su vaɫaw a tjaisangas.
S.PHON: "kudain a ini paŋcəz aŋa a su vaʎaw a caisaŋas.
S.FORM: "kudain a ini pangtjez anga a su valjaw a tjaisangas.
S.PHON: "kudain a ini paŋʦəz aŋa a su vaʎaw a ʦaisaŋas.
S.TRANSL: “What about your former husband who hasn’t come back?

S.FORM: nangaq a timitjanga a marevaɫaw.
S.PHON: naŋaq a timicaŋa a marəvaʎaw.
S.FORM: nangaq a timitjanga a marevaljaw.
S.PHON: naŋaq a timiʦaŋa a maRəvaʎaw.
S.TRANSL: Let us two live together.

S.FORM: anema su katjenglayan a matsidiɫ?" ayain a kiɫavaran a palayulayu.
S.PHON: anəma su kacəŋɭajan a maʦidiʎ" ajain a kiʎavaran a paɭajuɭaju.
S.FORM: anema su katjenglayan a macidilj?" ayain a kiljavaran a palayulayu.
S.PHON: anəma su kaʦəŋɣajan a maʦidiʎ" ajain a kiʎavaRan a paɣajuɣaju.
S.TRANSL: Why do you want to live alone?” he kept saying.

S.FORM: "nangaq nu maya.
S.PHON: "naŋaq nu maja.
S.FORM: "nangaq nu maya.
S.PHON: "naŋaq nu maja.
S.TRANSL: “All right then;

S.FORM: kudain a ini pangtjez anga a ku vaɫaw a tjaisangas," aya azua vavayan.
S.PHON: kudain a ini paŋcəz aŋa a ku vaʎaw a caisaŋas," aja azua vavajan.
S.FORM: kudain a ini pangtjez anga a ku valjaw a tjaisangas," aya azua vavayan.
S.PHON: kudain a ini paŋʦəz aŋa a ku vaʎaw a ʦaisaŋas," aja azua vavajan.
S.TRANSL: seeing that my former husband doesn’t come back,” said the woman.

S.FORM: qau makakeɫang anga a varung niamadju a maḍusa.
S.PHON: qau makakəʎaŋ aŋa a varuŋ niamaɉu a maɖusa.
S.FORM: qau makakeljang anga a varung niamadju a madrusa.
S.PHON: qau makakəʎaŋ aŋa a vaRuŋ niamaɉu a maɖusa.
S.TRANSL: So the two of them agreed to it.

S.FORM: qau malap tua vava, sa alap tua katjutjung tu ḍusa; sa kevava tiamadju.
S.PHON: qau maɭap tua vava, sa aɭap tua kacucuŋ tu ɖusa; sa kəvava tiamaɉu.
S.FORM: qau malap tua vava, sa alap tua katjutjung tu drusa; sa kevava tiamadju.
S.PHON: qau maɣap tua vava, sa aɣap tua kaʦuʦuŋ tu ɖusa; sa kəvava tiamaɉu.
S.TRANSL: They got some beer and two bamboo cups, and drank together.

S.FORM: qau maka kevava tiamadju.
S.PHON: qau maka kəvava tiamaɉu.
S.FORM: qau maka kevava tiamadju.
S.PHON: qau maka kəvava tiamaɉu.
S.TRANSL: When they had finished drinking,

S.FORM: taulan a vava katua katjutjung pi quluqulu.
S.PHON: tauɭan a vava katua kacucuŋ pi quɭuquɭu.
S.FORM: taulan a vava katua katjutjung pi quluqulu.
S.PHON: tauɣan a vava katua kaʦuʦuŋ pi quɣuquɣu.
S.TRANSL: they left the beer and cups at the head end (of the sleeping platform),

S.FORM: qau sa qereng tiamadju.
S.PHON: qau sa qərəŋ tiamaɉu.
S.FORM: qau sa qereng tiamadju.
S.PHON: qau sa qəRəŋ tiamaɉu.
S.TRANSL: and lay down.

S.FORM: manu mangtjez azua vaɫaw a tjaisangas, sa setsevungi nua tsaḍ i djalan.
S.PHON: manu maŋcəz azua vaʎaw a caisaŋas, sa səʦəvuŋi nua ʦaɖ i ɉaɭan.
S.FORM: manu mangtjez azua valjaw a tjaisangas, sa secevungi nua cadr i djalan.
S.PHON: manu maŋʦəz azua vaʎaw a ʦaisaŋas, sa səʦəvuŋi nua ʦaɖ i ɉaɣan.
S.TRANSL: The former husband came back, and met a thief along the way.

S.FORM: "ku katsuaw su kinatsu; pazuliuɫi aken tu lima iday," aya azua tsaḍ.
S.PHON: "ku kaʦuaw su kinaʦu; pazuɭiuʎi akən tu ɭima idaj," aja azua ʦaɖ.
S.FORM: "ku kacuaw su kinacu; pazuliulji aken tu lima iday," aya azua cadr.
S.PHON: "ku kaʦuaw su kinaʦu; pazuɣiuʎi akən tu ɣima idaj," aja azua ʦaɖ.
S.TRANSL: “I’ll carry your baggage; pay me 500,” said the thief.

S.FORM: "ui, katsuu nu maya; ku pazuliuɫay anga sun," aya azua vaɫaw a tjaisangas a uqaɫay.
S.PHON: "ui, kaʦuu nu maja; ku pazuɭiuʎaj aŋa sun," aja azua vaʎaw a caisaŋas a uqaʎaj.
S.FORM: "ui, kacuu nu maya; ku pazuliuljay anga sun," aya azua valjaw a tjaisangas a uqaljay.
S.PHON: "ui, kaʦuu nu maja; ku pazuɣiuʎaj aŋa sun," aja azua vaʎaw a ʦaisaŋas a uqaʎaj.
S.TRANSL: “All right; carry it then; I’ll pay you,” said the former husband.

S.FORM: qau katsuin nua tsaḍ a pasa tjua tapaw nimadju.
S.PHON: qau kaʦuin nua ʦaɖ a pasa cua tapaw nimaɉu.
S.FORM: qau kacuin nua cadr a pasa tjua tapaw nimadju.
S.PHON: qau kaʦuin nua ʦaɖ a pasa ʦua tapaw nimaɉu.
S.TRANSL: So the thief carried the things to the man’s house.

S.FORM: mintu kevavavava azua vaɫaw a vavayan katua uqaɫay a zuma.
S.PHON: mintu kəvavavava azua vaʎaw a vavajan katua uqaʎaj a zuma.
S.FORM: mintu kevavavava azua valjaw a vavayan katua uqaljay a zuma.
S.PHON: mintu kəvavavava azua vaʎaw a vavajan katua uqaʎaj a zuma.
S.TRANSL: The wife and the other man were drinking.

S.FORM: qau taulan nua tsaḍ pagaɫu azua nanemanemanga.
S.PHON: qau tauɭan nua ʦaɖ pagaʎu azua nanəmanəmaŋa.
S.FORM: qau taulan nua cadr pagalju azua nanemanemanga.
S.PHON: qau tauɣan nua ʦaɖ pagaʎu azua nanəmanəmaŋa.
S.TRANSL: The thief put everything down gently;

S.FORM: qau a tsaḍ: "nangaq kiqiɫa ken imaza iqumaqan.
S.PHON: qau a ʦaɖ: "naŋaq kiqiʎa kən imaza iqumaqan.
S.FORM: qau a cadr: "nangaq kiqilja ken imaza iqumaqan.
S.PHON: qau a ʦaɖ: "naŋaq kiqiʎa kən imaza iqumaqan.
S.TRANSL: and he said: “I’ll hide here in the back of the house.

S.FORM: qau nu taqed tiamadju, tsemakaw anga ken tua nanemanemanga, sa ku kavilad anga nusauni," aya timadju.
S.PHON: qau nu taqəd tiamaɉu, ʦəmakaw aŋa kən tua nanəmanəmaŋa, sa ku kaviɭad aŋa nusauni," aja timaɉu.
S.FORM: qau nu taqed tiamadju, cemakaw anga ken tua nanemanemanga, sa ku kavilad anga nusauni," aya timadju.
S.PHON: qau nu taqəd tiamaɉu, ʦəmakaw aŋa kən tua nanəmanəmaŋa, sa ku kaviɣad aŋa nusauni," aja timaɉu.
S.TRANSL: When they go to sleep, I’ll steal everything, and then escape later,” he said.

S.FORM: qau kiqiɫa itjua misulemaleman.
S.PHON: qau kiqiʎa icua misuɭəmaɭəman.
S.FORM: qau kiqilja itjua misulemaleman.
S.PHON: qau kiqiʎa iʦua misuɣəmaɣəman.
S.TRANSL: And he hid in the dark.

S.FORM: qau inika tsuay mangtjez azua vaɫaw a tjaisangas.
S.PHON: qau inika ʦuaj maŋcəz azua vaʎaw a caisaŋas.
S.FORM: qau inika cuay mangtjez azua valjaw a tjaisangas.
S.PHON: qau inika ʦuaj maŋʦəz azua vaʎaw a ʦaisaŋas.
S.TRANSL: Soon the former husband came.

S.FORM: manu patjarakeɫang azua vaɫaw a tjaiviliɫ a uqaɫay tu muri mangtjez azua vaɫaw a tjaisangas.
S.PHON: manu pacarakəʎaŋ azua vaʎaw a caiviɭiʎ a uqaʎaj tu muri maŋcəz azua vaʎaw a caisaŋas.
S.FORM: manu patjarakeljang azua valjaw a tjaivililj a uqaljay tu muri mangtjez azua valjaw a tjaisangas.
S.PHON: manu paʦaRakəʎaŋ azua vaʎaw a ʦaiviɣiʎ a uqaʎaj tu muRi maŋʦəz azua vaʎaw a ʦaisaŋas.
S.TRANSL: The second husband got to know that the former husband was coming.

S.FORM: qau migatsaɫ sa vaik a sema patekuteku tua taqtaq.
S.PHON: qau migaʦaʎ sa vaik a səma patəkutəku tua taqtaq.
S.FORM: qau migacalj sa vaik a sema patekuteku tua taqtaq.
S.PHON: qau migaʦaʎ sa vaik a səma patəkutəku tua taqtaq.
S.TRANSL: He got up and went under the sleeping platform.

S.FORM: qau mangtjez azua vaɫaw a tjaisangas a uqaɫay.
S.PHON: qau maŋcəz azua vaʎaw a caisaŋas a uqaʎaj.
S.FORM: qau mangtjez azua valjaw a tjaisangas a uqaljay.
S.PHON: qau maŋʦəz azua vaʎaw a ʦaisaŋas a uqaʎaj.
S.TRANSL: The former husband arrived.

S.FORM: qau nataqed anga azua vavayan.
S.PHON: qau nataqəd aŋa azua vavajan.
S.FORM: qau nataqed anga azua vavayan.
S.PHON: qau nataqəd aŋa azua vavajan.
S.TRANSL: The woman was asleep,

S.FORM: qau tegain anga nazua vaɫaw a tjaisangas azua vavayan.
S.PHON: qau təgain aŋa nazua vaʎaw a caisaŋas azua vavajan.
S.FORM: qau tegain anga nazua valjaw a tjaisangas azua vavayan.
S.PHON: qau təgain aŋa nazua vaʎaw a ʦaisaŋas azua vavajan.
S.TRANSL: but the former husband woke her up.

S.FORM: qau patseged azua vavayan.
S.PHON: qau paʦəgəd azua vavajan.
S.FORM: qau paceged azua vavayan.
S.PHON: qau paʦəgəd azua vavajan.
S.TRANSL: She woke up,

S.FORM: "aku uzai a vava katua katjutjung imaza?" ayain a vavayan.
S.PHON: "aku uzai a vava katua kacucuŋ imaza" ajain a vavajan.
S.FORM: "aku uzai a vava katua katjutjung imaza?" ayain a vavayan.
S.PHON: "aku uzai a vava katua kaʦuʦuŋ imaza" ajain a vavajan.
S.TRANSL: and he said to her: “Why is there beer and cups here?”

S.FORM: "ui angata.
S.PHON: "ui aŋata.
S.FORM: "ui angata.
S.PHON: "ui aŋata.
S.TRANSL: “Oh well,

S.FORM: nu keman aken, ku sipazekazekatj sun a palayulayu," aya maitazua a kiɫavaran azua vavayan.
S.PHON: nu kəman akən, ku sipazəkazəkac sun a paɭajuɭaju," aja maitazua a kiʎavaran azua vavajan.
S.FORM: nu keman aken, ku sipazekazekatj sun a palayulayu," aya maitazua a kiljavaran azua vavayan.
S.PHON: nu kəman akən, ku sipazəkazəkaʦ sun a paɣajuɣaju," aja maitazua a kiʎavaRan azua vavajan.
S.TRANSL: when I eat I always put some out for you too,” the woman just said.

S.FORM: qau paɫeteku azua vavayan, sa kevava tiamadju.
S.PHON: qau paʎətəku azua vavajan, sa kəvava tiamaɉu.
S.FORM: qau paljeteku azua vavayan, sa kevava tiamadju.
S.PHON: qau paʎətəku azua vavajan, sa kəvava tiamaɉu.
S.TRANSL: The woman set out the beer (on a table), and they drank.

S.FORM: qau talavan tua vava azua uqaɫay; mapulaw aravats; maipuq anga.
S.PHON: qau taɭavan tua vava azua uqaʎaj; mapuɭaw aravaʦ; maipuq aŋa.
S.FORM: qau talavan tua vava azua uqaljay; mapulaw aravac; maipuq anga.
S.PHON: qau taɣavan tua vava azua uqaʎaj; mapuɣaw aRavaʦ; maipuq aŋa.
S.TRANSL: The man got full up with beer, got very drunk, and fell down.

S.FORM: qau azua tsaḍ katua vaɫaw a tjaiviliɫ a uqaɫay, avan tazua kevavavavanan a maḍusa, nakiqiɫa i patekuteku tua taqtaq a maḍusa itjua misulemaleman.
S.PHON: qau azua ʦaɖ katua vaʎaw a caiviɭiʎ a uqaʎaj, avan tazua kəvavavavanan a maɖusa, nakiqiʎa i patəkutəku tua taqtaq a maɖusa icua misuɭəmaɭəman.
S.FORM: qau azua cadr katua valjaw a tjaivililj a uqaljay, avan tazua kevavavavanan a madrusa, nakiqilja i patekuteku tua taqtaq a madrusa itjua misulemaleman.
S.PHON: qau azua ʦaɖ katua vaʎaw a ʦaiviɣiʎ a uqaʎaj, avan tazua kəvavavavanan a maɖusa, nakiqiʎa i patəkutəku tua taqtaq a maɖusa iʦua misuɣəmaɣəman.
S.TRANSL: The thief and the second husband, while these two were still drinking, were both hidden under the sleeping platform in the dark.

S.FORM: manu uzai a djurikuku i taladj tua taqtaq.
S.PHON: manu uzai a ɉurikuku i taɭaɉ tua taqtaq.
S.FORM: manu uzai a djurikuku i taladj tua taqtaq.
S.PHON: manu uzai a ɉuRikuku i taɣaɉ tua taqtaq.
S.TRANSL: There was a cockerel under the platform.

S.FORM: manu sakutsin nua tsaḍ; zemaing.
S.PHON: manu sakuʦin nua ʦaɖ; zəmaiŋ.
S.FORM: manu sakucin nua cadr; zemaing.
S.PHON: manu sakuʦin nua ʦaɖ; zəmaiŋ.
S.TRANSL: When the thief moved it, it crowed.

S.FORM: qau marekutj tu djumaken azua tsaḍ.
S.PHON: qau marəkuc tu ɉumakən azua ʦaɖ.
S.FORM: qau marekutj tu djumaken azua cadr.
S.PHON: qau maRəkuʦ tu ɉumakən azua ʦaɖ.
S.TRANSL: The thief was afraid of being found.

S.FORM: "ɫa quluqulu aken," aya timadju.
S.PHON: "ʎa quɭuquɭu akən," aja timaɉu.
S.FORM: "lja quluqulu aken," aya timadju.
S.PHON: "ʎa quɣuquɣu akən," aja timaɉu.
S.TRANSL: “I’ll go to the head end,” he said.

S.FORM: mintu mapatsatsagtsag a qulu katu azua qulu na vaɫaw a tjaiviliɫ a uqaɫay.
S.PHON: mintu mapaʦaʦagʦag a quɭu katu azua quɭu na vaʎaw a caiviɭiʎ a uqaʎaj.
S.FORM: mintu mapacacagcag a qulu katu azua qulu na valjaw a tjaivililj a uqaljay.
S.PHON: mintu mapaʦaʦagʦag a quɣu katu azua quɣu na vaʎaw a ʦaiviɣiʎ a uqaʎaj.
S.TRANSL: His head bumped into the head of the second husband.

S.FORM: qau azua tsaḍ: "aku uzai a tsautsau imaza?" aya azua tsaḍ.
S.PHON: qau azua ʦaɖ: "aku uzai a ʦauʦau imaza" aja azua ʦaɖ.
S.FORM: qau azua cadr: "aku uzai a caucau imaza?" aya azua cadr.
S.PHON: qau azua ʦaɖ: "aku uzai a ʦauʦau imaza" aja azua ʦaɖ.
S.TRANSL: “Why is there someone in here?” said the thief.

S.FORM: "nangaq a vaik aken a sema azua i tja iqumaqan a kiqiɫa," aya timadju.
S.PHON: "naŋaq a vaik akən a səma azua i ca iqumaqan a kiqiʎa," aja timaɉu.
S.FORM: "nangaq a vaik aken a sema azua i tja iqumaqan a kiqilja," aya timadju.
S.PHON: "naŋaq a vaik akən a səma azua i ʦa iqumaqan a kiqiʎa," aja timaɉu.
S.TRANSL: “I had better go and hide further into the house,” he said.

S.FORM: qau avan azua vaɫaw uta tjaiviliɫ a uqaɫay: "nangaq a vaik aken sema azua i tja iqumaqan a kiqiɫa," aya timadju.
S.PHON: qau avan azua vaʎaw uta caiviɭiʎ a uqaʎaj: "naŋaq a vaik akən səma azua i ca iqumaqan a kiqiʎa," aja timaɉu.
S.FORM: qau avan azua valjaw uta tjaivililj a uqaljay: "nangaq a vaik aken sema azua i tja iqumaqan a kiqilja," aya timadju.
S.PHON: qau avan azua vaʎaw uta ʦaiviɣiʎ a uqaʎaj: "naŋaq a vaik akən səma azua i ʦa iqumaqan a kiqiʎa," aja timaɉu.
S.TRANSL: And the second husband also was the same. “I had better go and hide further into the house,” he said.

S.FORM: manu izuanga tsaḍ a nakiqiɫa; matsatsagtsag anan a qulu.
S.PHON: manu izuaŋa ʦaɖ a nakiqiʎa; maʦaʦagʦag anan a quɭu.
S.FORM: manu izuanga cadr a nakiqilja; macacagcag anan a qulu.
S.PHON: manu izuaŋa ʦaɖ a nakiqiʎa; maʦaʦagʦag anan a quɣu.
S.TRANSL: The thief was hidden there, and they bumped heads again.

S.FORM: qau vaik azua tsaḍ uta a sema laukung.
S.PHON: qau vaik azua ʦaɖ uta a səma ɭaukuŋ.
S.FORM: qau vaik azua cadr uta a sema laukung.
S.PHON: qau vaik azua ʦaɖ uta a səma ɣaukuŋ.
S.TRANSL: The thief moved again to the roof store-place.

S.FORM: azua vaɫaw a tjaiviliɫ a uqaɫay: "uzai a tsautsau imaza uta.
S.PHON: azua vaʎaw a caiviɭiʎ a uqaʎaj: "uzai a ʦauʦau imaza uta.
S.FORM: azua valjaw a tjaivililj a uqaljay: "uzai a caucau imaza uta.
S.PHON: azua vaʎaw a ʦaiviɣiʎ a uqaʎaj: "uzai a ʦauʦau imaza uta.
S.TRANSL: The second husband said: “There is someone here too.

S.FORM: nangaq a vaik aken a sema zua i laukung a kiqiɫa," aya.
S.PHON: naŋaq a vaik akən a səma zua i ɭaukuŋ a kiqiʎa," aja.
S.FORM: nangaq a vaik aken a sema zua i laukung a kiqilja," aya.
S.PHON: naŋaq a vaik akən a səma zua i ɣaukuŋ a kiqiʎa," aja.
S.TRANSL: I had better go and hide in the roof store-place!

S.FORM: qau vaik.
S.PHON: qau vaik.
S.FORM: qau vaik.
S.PHON: qau vaik.
S.TRANSL: So he went there;

S.FORM: mintu mapatsatsagtsag anan a qulu uta.
S.PHON: mintu mapaʦaʦagʦag anan a quɭu uta.
S.FORM: mintu mapacacagcag anan a qulu uta.
S.PHON: mintu mapaʦaʦagʦag anan a quɣu uta.
S.TRANSL: and they bumped heads once more.

S.FORM: "ii, aku uzai a tsautsau imaza uta?" aya zua tsaḍ.
S.PHON: "ii, aku uzai a ʦauʦau imaza uta" aja zua ʦaɖ.
S.FORM: "ii, aku uzai a caucau imaza uta?" aya zua cadr.
S.PHON: "ii, aku uzai a ʦauʦau imaza uta" aja zua ʦaɖ.
S.TRANSL: “Ow! Why is there someone here too?” said the thief.

S.FORM: "masa namapeɫuq tua tsautsau tjua imaza," aya zua tsaḍ.
S.PHON: "masa namapəʎuq tua ʦauʦau cua imaza," aja zua ʦaɖ.
S.FORM: "masa namapeljuq tua caucau tjua imaza," aya zua cadr.
S.PHON: "masa namapəʎuq tua ʦauʦau ʦua imaza," aja zua ʦaɖ.
S.TRANSL: “This place seems to be full of people,” said the thief,

S.FORM: migergerger anga tua rekutjan.
S.PHON: migərgərgər aŋa tua rəkucan.
S.FORM: migergerger anga tua rekutjan.
S.PHON: migəRgəRgəR aŋa tua Rəkuʦan.
S.TRANSL: and trembled with fear.

S.FORM: manu mapulaw aravats aza vaɫaw a tjaisangas a uqaɫay; qau taqed anga.
S.PHON: manu mapuɭaw aravaʦ aza vaʎaw a caisaŋas a uqaʎaj; qau taqəd aŋa.
S.FORM: manu mapulaw aravac aza valjaw a tjaisangas a uqaljay; qau taqed anga.
S.PHON: manu mapuɣaw aRavaʦ aza vaʎaw a ʦaisaŋas a uqaʎaj; qau taqəd aŋa.
S.TRANSL: Now the former husband was very drunk and asleep.

S.FORM: qau ɫekatsauan anga azua vaɫaw a tjaiviliɫ a uqaɫay.
S.PHON: qau ʎəkaʦauan aŋa azua vaʎaw a caiviɭiʎ a uqaʎaj.
S.FORM: qau ljekacauan anga azua valjaw a tjaivililj a uqaljay.
S.PHON: qau ʎəkaʦauan aŋa azua vaʎaw a ʦaiviɣiʎ a uqaʎaj.
S.TRANSL: So the second husband emerged.

S.FORM: qau "muri kemuda sun?
S.PHON: qau "muri kəmuda sun
S.FORM: qau "muri kemuda sun?
S.PHON: qau "muRi kəmuda sun
S.TRANSL: “What are you going to do?

S.FORM: muri kamayan sun a puvaɫaw tua su vaɫaw a tjaisangas kemuda?" ayain azua vavayan.
S.PHON: muri kamajan sun a puvaʎaw tua su vaʎaw a caisaŋas kəmuda" ajain azua vavajan.
S.FORM: muri kamayan sun a puvaljaw tua su valjaw a tjaisangas kemuda?" ayain azua vavayan.
S.PHON: muRi kamajan sun a puvaʎaw tua su vaʎaw a ʦaisaŋas kəmuda" ajain azua vavajan.
S.TRANSL: Are you going to carry on being married to your former husband, or what?” he said to the woman.

S.FORM: ɫakua "neka.
S.PHON: ʎakua "nəka.
S.FORM: ljakua "neka.
S.PHON: ʎakua "nəka.
S.TRANSL: But the woman said: “No.

S.FORM: timitjayay anga a marevaɫaw.
S.PHON: timicajaj aŋa a marəvaʎaw.
S.FORM: timitjayay anga a marevaljaw.
S.PHON: timiʦajaj aŋa a maRəvaʎaw.
S.TRANSL: We two will live together.

S.FORM: tja qetsiaw anga azua ku vaɫaw a tjaisangas," aya azua vavayan.
S.PHON: ca qəʦiaw aŋa azua ku vaʎaw a caisaŋas," aja azua vavajan.
S.FORM: tja qeciaw anga azua ku valjaw a tjaisangas," aya azua vavayan.
S.PHON: ʦa qəʦiaw aŋa azua ku vaʎaw a ʦaisaŋas," aja azua vavajan.
S.TRANSL: We’ll kill my former husband.”

S.FORM: qau "tja kudain a qemtsi, sa ini keɫang tu tima a naqemtsi?" aya tiamadju.
S.PHON: qau "ca kudain a qəmʦi, sa ini kəʎaŋ tu tima a naqəmʦi" aja tiamaɉu.
S.FORM: qau "tja kudain a qemci, sa ini keljang tu tima a naqemci?" aya tiamadju.
S.PHON: qau "ʦa kudain a qəmʦi, sa ini kəʎaŋ tu tima a naqəmʦi" aja tiamaɉu.
S.TRANSL: “How can we kill him, without it being known who has killed him?” they said.

S.FORM: kiɫavaran a vavayan: "azua mapulaw.
S.PHON: kiʎavaran a vavajan: "azua mapuɭaw.
S.FORM: kiljavaran a vavayan: "azua mapulaw.
S.PHON: kiʎavaRan a vavajan: "azua mapuɣaw.
S.TRANSL: The woman said: “He’s drunk.

S.FORM: tja sialapan tua bungbung, sa pizua-i tua qatjuvi.
S.PHON: ca siaɭapan tua buŋbuŋ, sa pizua-i tua qacuvi.
S.FORM: tja sialapan tua bungbung, sa pizua-i tua qatjuvi.
S.PHON: ʦa siaɣapan tua buŋbuŋ, sa pizua-i tua qaʦuvi.
S.TRANSL: Let’s take a bamboo tube and put a snake in it.

S.FORM: qau sa tja tsage-i tua sapui a iku nua qatjuvi.
S.PHON: qau sa ca ʦagə-i tua sapui a iku nua qacuvi.
S.FORM: qau sa tja cage-i tua sapui a iku nua qatjuvi.
S.PHON: qau sa ʦa ʦagə-i tua sapui a iku nua qaʦuvi.
S.TRANSL: Then let’s heat the snake’s tail with fire;

S.FORM: qau ki mintuluq anga azua qatjuvi a sema tjua tjiaɫ nimadju," aya tiamadju a maɫavar.
S.PHON: qau ki mintuɭuq aŋa azua qacuvi a səma cua ciaʎ nimaɉu," aja tiamaɉu a maʎavar.
S.FORM: qau ki mintuluq anga azua qatjuvi a sema tjua tjialj nimadju," aya tiamadju a maljavar.
S.PHON: qau ki mintuɣuq aŋa azua qaʦuvi a səma ʦua ʦiaʎ nimaɉu," aja tiamaɉu a maʎavaR.
S.TRANSL: and the snake will dart forward into his stomach,” they decided.

S.FORM: qau aitazuain a qemtsi azua vaɫaw a tjaisangas.
S.PHON: qau aitazuain a qəmʦi azua vaʎaw a caisaŋas.
S.FORM: qau aitazuain a qemci azua valjaw a tjaisangas.
S.PHON: qau aitazuain a qəmʦi azua vaʎaw a ʦaisaŋas.
S.TRANSL: So that’s how the former husband was killed.

S.FORM: qau a tsaḍ kiqeneqenetj tazua maḍusa a paɫetalataladj tua qatjuvi.
S.PHON: qau a ʦaɖ kiqənəqənəc tazua maɖusa a paʎətaɭataɭaɉ tua qacuvi.
S.FORM: qau a cadr kiqeneqenetj tazua madrusa a paljetalataladj tua qatjuvi.
S.PHON: qau a ʦaɖ kiqənəqənəʦ tazua maɖusa a paʎətaɣataɣaɉ tua qaʦuvi.
S.TRANSL: Now the thief saw the two putting the snake in.

S.FORM: qau marekutj anga azua tsaḍ tu sika uzai anga tsautsau iqumaqan a namatsay anga.
S.PHON: qau marəkuc aŋa azua ʦaɖ tu sika uzai aŋa ʦauʦau iqumaqan a namaʦaj aŋa.
S.FORM: qau marekutj anga azua cadr tu sika uzai anga caucau iqumaqan a namacay anga.
S.PHON: qau maRəkuʦ aŋa azua ʦaɖ tu sika uzai aŋa ʦauʦau iqumaqan a namaʦaj aŋa.
S.TRANSL: The thief was afraid that there was going to be a dead person in the house,

S.FORM: mintuluq anga ɫetsasaw.
S.PHON: mintuɭuq aŋa ʎəʦasaw.
S.FORM: mintuluq anga ljecasaw.
S.PHON: mintuɣuq aŋa ʎəʦasaw.
S.TRANSL: and he dashed outside.

S.FORM: qau maɫianga; manu kemɫang a mamazangiɫan tu uzai a namatsay a tsautsau.
S.PHON: qau maʎiaŋa; manu kəmʎaŋ a mamazaŋiʎan tu uzai a namaʦaj a ʦauʦau.
S.FORM: qau maljianga; manu kemljang a mamazangiljan tu uzai a namacay a caucau.
S.PHON: qau maʎiaŋa; manu kəmʎaŋ a mamazaŋiʎan tu uzai a namaʦaj a ʦauʦau.
S.TRANSL: Next day the chief heard that someone had died;

S.FORM: qau vaik a kivadaq tazua vaɫaw a vavayan.
S.PHON: qau vaik a kivadaq tazua vaʎaw a vavajan.
S.FORM: qau vaik a kivadaq tazua valjaw a vavayan.
S.PHON: qau vaik a kivadaq tazua vaʎaw a vavajan.
S.TRANSL: so he went to ask the wife.

S.FORM: ɫakua "kemɫang (aken) tu tima a naqemtsi" aya maitazua tjemumaɫ.
S.PHON: ʎakua "kəmʎaŋ (akən) tu tima a naqəmʦi" aja maitazua cəmumaʎ.
S.FORM: ljakua "kemljang (aken) tu tima a naqemci" aya maitazua tjemumalj.
S.PHON: ʎakua "kəmʎaŋ (akən) tu tima a naqəmʦi" aja maitazua ʦəmumaʎ.
S.TRANSL: But she just said: “How can we (?I) know who killed him?” (?)

S.FORM: manu vaivaik azua mamazangiɫan a sema kavuavuan; setsevungan a tsaḍ.
S.PHON: manu vaivaik azua mamazaŋiʎan a səma kavuavuan; səʦəvuŋan a ʦaɖ.
S.FORM: manu vaivaik azua mamazangiljan a sema kavuavuan; secevungan a cadr.
S.PHON: manu vaivaik azua mamazaŋiʎan a səma kavuavuan; səʦəvuŋan a ʦaɖ.
S.TRANSL: The chief was going to the fields, and he met the thief.

S.FORM: "aku ini su puvaɫavaɫaw?
S.PHON: "aku ini su puvaʎavaʎaw
S.FORM: "aku ini su puvaljavaljaw?
S.PHON: "aku ini su puvaʎavaʎaw
S.TRANSL: “Why don’t you get married?

S.FORM: tiaken a kisan muilang tjanusun," ayain azua tsaḍ.
S.PHON: tiakən a kisan muiɭaŋ canusun," ajain azua ʦaɖ.
S.FORM: tiaken a kisan muilang tjanusun," ayain azua cadr.
S.PHON: tiakən a kisan muiɣaŋ ʦanusun," ajain azua ʦaɖ.
S.TRANSL: I’ll act as go-between for you,” he said to the thief.

S.FORM: mintu valisvis azua tsaḍ.
S.PHON: mintu vaɭisvis azua ʦaɖ.
S.FORM: mintu valisvis azua cadr.
S.PHON: mintu vaɣisvis azua ʦaɖ.
S.TRANSL: The thief shook his head.

S.FORM: "marekutj aken a puvaɫaw.
S.PHON: "marəkuc akən a puvaʎaw.
S.FORM: "marekutj aken a puvaljaw.
S.PHON: "maRəkuʦ akən a puvaʎaw.
S.TRANSL: “I’m afraid of getting married.

S.FORM: uzai anga ku ɫinengɫengan a paɫetalataladjan tua qatjuvi sa patsay anga.
S.PHON: uzai aŋa ku ʎinəŋʎəŋan a paʎətaɭataɭaɉan tua qacuvi sa paʦaj aŋa.
S.FORM: uzai anga ku ljinengljengan a paljetalataladjan tua qatjuvi sa pacay anga.
S.PHON: uzai aŋa ku ʎinəŋʎəŋan a paʎətaɣataɣaɉan tua qaʦuvi sa paʦaj aŋa.
S.TRANSL: I’ve seen someone who had a snake put in him and he died.

S.FORM: avan ku sika rekutj a puvaɫaw," aya zua tsaḍ.
S.PHON: avan ku sika rəkuc a puvaʎaw," aja zua ʦaɖ.
S.FORM: avan ku sika rekutj a puvaljaw," aya zua cadr.
S.PHON: avan ku sika Rəkuʦ a puvaʎaw," aja zua ʦaɖ.
S.TRANSL: That’s why I’m afraid of marrying,” said the thief;

S.FORM: qau sa tjumaɫ tu tima a ɫinengɫengan.
S.PHON: qau sa cumaʎ tu tima a ʎinəŋʎəŋan.
S.FORM: qau sa tjumalj tu tima a ljinengljengan.
S.PHON: qau sa ʦumaʎ tu tima a ʎinəŋʎəŋan.
S.TRANSL: and he told whom he had seen.

S.FORM: qau kemɫang anga azua mamazangiɫan tu tima.
S.PHON: qau kəmʎaŋ aŋa azua mamazaŋiʎan tu tima.
S.FORM: qau kemljang anga azua mamazangiljan tu tima.
S.PHON: qau kəmʎaŋ aŋa azua mamazaŋiʎan tu tima.
S.TRANSL: So now the chief knew who it was.

S.FORM: qau qetsin anga zua vavayan katua uqaɫay a ɫemaḍusa.
S.PHON: qau qəʦin aŋa zua vavajan katua uqaʎaj a ʎəmaɖusa.
S.FORM: qau qecin anga zua vavayan katua uqaljay a ljemadrusa.
S.PHON: qau qəʦin aŋa zua vavajan katua uqaʎaj a ʎəmaɖusa.
S.TRANSL: And the woman and the man were both killed.
